name: Chicken and Broccoli (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Sherry or fat-free chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl and mix until smooth to form a marinade.
2. Place 2 medium-size boneless, skinless chicken breast halves in a shallow dish with vegetable oil.
3. Add sliced onions and frozen broccoli pieces (6 oz.) to a heavy frying pan.
4. Cook the onions and broccoli over moderate heat for about 1 minute or until the vegetables are thawed.
5. Pour in the fat-free chicken broth and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the broccoli is crisp-tender.
6. Add the marinade and cook over moderate heat until the sauce thickens and clears.
7. Return the chicken to the pan with the sauce and stir until heated through.
8. Serve 2/3 cup per serving over rice.
Nutritive values per serving (without rice): 194 CAL, 9gm CHO, 20gm PRO, 8gm FAT, 1212mg Na
Food exchanges per serving: 1 vegetable, 3 lean meat
Low-sodium diets: Substitute 1/4 cup lemon juice for soy sauce and use 1/4 tsp. thyme instead of ground ginger.
